scope: two-epoch, zero-initialized, tanh-capped shallow target-attention transfer on frozen D2 states; complete history defines non-repeat eligibility and the probe consumes the latest 20 events

g0.base: calibration D2p, alpha=0.6, FP32, full candidate sets

post_outcome_read_only_diagnostic.purpose: distinguish a zero residual from a non-ranking common-mode collapse; not used for tuning or another attempt
post_outcome_read_only_diagnostic.score_delta_dispersion_note: the approximately 1e-7 dispersion in (base+1)-base is float32 subtraction rounding; the model-internal tanh residual is exactly 1 for every valid candidate
post_outcome_read_only_diagnostic.interpretation: the bounded residual saturated at a candidate-common +1 translation, a listwise-null direction, instead of learning candidate-discriminative history evidence

decision.close_claim: this fixed two-epoch, zero-initialized, tanh-capped shallow target-attention recipe over the frozen calibration-D2 representation can learn useful non-repeat transfer
decision.do_not_claim: all cross-item history mechanisms or deeper LMs are impossible

next_design_constraints: eliminate candidate-common score translations algebraically and audit within-request delta dispersion before any ranking claim
bound the final candidate-relative score residual, not only attention mass or hidden-state scale
require a new untouched cohort and a separately frozen hypothesis before testing a revised relative-logit mechanism
keep exact recurrence as an action/recency-aware monotone final-logit path rather than an unprotected positive alignment atom
do not train on the same corruption families used as the decisive evidence-authenticity gate
caveats: Dynamic candidate-budget batches give candidate-heavy requests more per-request optimizer weight. Final internal NDCG is request-equal; this does not explain or rescue the exact zero ranking change.

The registered D2 checkpoint epoch and alpha were selected on the broader 9694-request calibration partition containing this cohort. G2a is therefore a preregistered falsifier relative to registered D2p, not a completely untouched unbiased base evaluation; this does not alter the zero rank-change fact.
The explanatory saturation audit was read-only and post-outcome. It is reproducible from the frozen checkpoint and inputs but is not gate or tuning evidence.

The 26 source tests ran in the repository default Python environment; the isolated GPU environment myrec-c05 did not contain pytest. GPU runtime imports, compilation and the real G1 smoke passed in myrec-c05.
